SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2014 - JUDGMENT.
